bugs.title: Plan-specified Gradle wrapper version (8.10) too old for fabric-loom 1.10-SNAPSHOT
bugs.suggested_fix: Bump distributionUrl to gradle-8.12-bin.zip (orchestrator already applied inline)

bugs.title: Plan-specified FLK version 1.13.5+kotlin.2.0.21 does not exist on Fabric Maven
bugs.evidence: Maven 404 on https://maven.fabricmc.net/net/fabricmc/fabric-language-kotlin/1.13.5+kotlin.2.0.21/. Latest published version is 1.13.11+kotlin.2.3.21.
bugs.suggested_fix: Bump kotlin_version to 2.3.21 in root gradle.properties; bump flk_version to 1.13.11+kotlin.2.3.21 in versions/1.21.4/gradle.properties; bump Kotlin plugin in build.gradle.kts to 2.3.21 (orchestrator applied inline)

bugs.title: EntityAttributes.GENERIC_ATTACK_DAMAGE/SPEED renamed in Yarn 1.21.4
bugs.suggested_fix: Replace GENERIC_ATTACK_DAMAGE with ATTACK_DAMAGE and GENERIC_ATTACK_SPEED with ATTACK_SPEED (orchestrator applied inline)

bugs.title: Item.Settings requires registryKey() before Item construction in 1.21.4
bugs.evidence: Runtime NPE: 'Item id not set' at Item$Settings.getTranslationKey when DndWeaponItem super(settings) is called
bugs.expected: Settings should know its RegistryKey before Item.<init> runs
bugs.suggested_fix: Build RegistryKey<Item> first, call Item.Settings().registryKey(itemKey), then construct DndWeaponItem and pass the key to Registry.register (orchestrator applied inline)

bugs.title: Longsword recipe JSON fails to parse on 1.21.4 (missing fabric:type discriminator)
bugs.evidence: Server log: 'Map entry I : Input does not contain a key [fabric:type]: MapLike[{tag:c:ingots/iron}]'
bugs.expected: Recipe loads cleanly on MC 1.21.4 datapack reload
bugs.suggested_fix: Either upgrade the ingredient schema to include fabric:type discriminator, or use raw vanilla minecraft:ingredient form. Address in Wave 11 (final verification) once full schema is confirmed via runtime testing.

orchestrator_note: All 4 P0/P1 bugs were caught by the wave 7 smoke test and inline-fixed by the orchestrator before continuing to wave 8. Bug 5 (recipe JSON schema) is deferred to wave 11 verification.
